lobe.name: Svrn7.Society
lobe.title: SVRN7 Society LOBE
lobe.description: Society-level monetary and identity operations. Wraps ISvrn7SocietyDriver. Handles citizen registration, same-Society and cross-Society transfers, overdraft management, and society membership queries. Loaded eagerly at TDA startup.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Transfer Request
protocols.description: Citizen-initiated intra-Society SVRN7 transfer. Handled by Switchboard special case (Option A: idempotency checked before routing).

protocols.title: Cross-Society Transfer Order
protocols.description: TransferOrderCredential from a peer Society. Switchboard checks IProcessedOrderStore for idempotency before routing.

protocols.title: Transfer Order Receipt
protocols.description: Settlement confirmation from a receiving Society.

protocols.title: Onboard Request (Society handler)
protocols.description: Handled via Svrn7.Onboarding LOBE which calls Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety.

cmdlets.name: Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety
cmdlets.title: Register Citizen
cmdlets.description: Registers a citizen in the Society: creates CitizenRecord, wallet, endowment UTXO, EndowmentCredential VC, and Merkle log entry. Used by Onboarding LOBE pipeline.

cmdlets.name: Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer
cmdlets.title: Execute Incoming Transfer
cmdlets.description: Processes an authenticated inbound SVRN7 transfer (same-Society or cross-Society credit). Validates, executes, appends Merkle log entry.

cmdlets.name: Test-Svrn7SocietyMember
cmdlets.title: Test Society Membership
cmdlets.description: Returns true if the given DID belongs to a registered citizen of this Society. Accepts primary or secondary DIDs.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Core Society LOBE. Exposes all SVRN7 monetary operations (transfer, registration, balance) and Society identity queries. Always loaded eagerly — available in all runspaces without Import-Module.
useCases: Execute a same-Society transfer as part of the invoice pipeline
Register a new citizen and issue the endowment VC
Check Society membership before routing a cross-Society message
compositionHints: Test-Svrn7SocietyMember before choosing between Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer and Invoke-Svrn7ExternalTransfer
Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer is idempotent via Nonce — safe to retry on transient failure
Register-Svrn7CitizenInSociety throws SocietyEndowmentDepletedException — always handle this case
limitations: Transfer protocols (transfer/1.0/*) go through Switchboard idempotency special case (Option A) before reaching this LOBE.
Epoch 0: no trading or market-rate transfers. Fixed grana amounts only.
